import json, re, unicodedata, sys, textwrap, itertools, math, statistics, random, os, pandas as pd

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

def search_quran(sub):
    results = []
    for rec in quran:
        ayah = rec.get("ayah_text","")
        if sub in ayah:
            results.append(ayah)
    return results

search_terms = ["أَنَا رَبُّكُمُ", "رَبُّكُمُ الْأَعْلَى", "فَقَالَ أَنَا رَبُّكُمُ"]
hits = {t: search_quran(t) for t in search_terms}
hits

import re, json, unicodedata

def strip_tashkeel(s):
    # Remove Arabic diacritics
    return "".join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')

def normalize_ar(s):
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ى","ي").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ٰ","")
    s = s.replace("ة","ه")
    s = re.sub(r"[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]", "", s)
    s = strip_tashkeel(s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

# Build normalized ayahs list
norm_ayahs = [(i, rec.get("ayah_text",""), normalize_ar(rec.get("ayah_text",""))) for i, rec in enumerate(quran)]
def norm_search(sub):
    nsub = normalize_ar(sub)
    return [(orig, ntext) for i, orig, ntext in norm_ayahs if nsub in ntext]

queries = ["انا ربكم الاعلى", "فقال انا ربكم الاعلى", "انا ربكم القدير", "انا ربكم"]
{q: norm_search(q)[:5] for q in queries}

matches = norm_search("فقال انا ربكم الاعلى")
text = matches[0][0]
print(text)
print(ascii(text))
